---
title: "My papers"
---

You can find an up-to-date list of my research articles also on my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=h9-xAdAAAAAJ). If you have trouble accessing the full-text version of any of the articles below, please [get in touch](mailto:contact@bodkan.net). I'm happy to share a PDF of any article I authored or co-authored.

## First-author publications

- **_slendr_: a framework for spatio-temporal population genomic simulations on geographic landscapes** [[link]](https://evolbiol.peercommunityin.org/articles/rec?id=630)<br>
<u>M Petr</u>, BC Haller, PL Ralph, F Racimo<br>
**_PCI EvolBiol_**, 2022.03. 20.485041<br>(2023)<br>

- **The evolutionary history of Neanderthal and Denisovan Y chromosomes** [[link]](https://www.science.org/doi/full/10.1126/science.abb6460)<br>
<u>M Petr</u>, M Hajdinjak, Q Fu, E Essel, H Rougier, I Crevecoeur, P Semal, _et al._<br>
**_Science_** 369 (6511), 1653-1656<br>(2020)<br>

- **_admixr_&mdash;R package for reproducible analyses using ADMIXTOOLS** [[link]](https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/article/35/17/3194/5298728)<br>
<u>M Petr</u>, B Vernot, J Kelso<br>
**_Bioinformatics_** 35 (17), 3194-3195<br>
(2019)<br>

- **Limits of long-term selection against Neandertal introgression** [[link]](https://www.pnas.org/doi/full/10.1073/pnas.1814338116)<br>
<u>M Petr</u>, S Pääbo, J Kelso, B Vernot<br>
**_PNAS_** 116 (5), 1639-1644<br>
(2018)<br>

## Co-authored publications

- **Exploring the effects of ecological parameters on the spatial structure of genetic tree sequences** [[link]](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.03.27.534388v2.abstract)<br>
MK Ianni-Ravn, <u>M Petr</u>, F Racimo<br>
**_bioRxiv_**, 2023.03. 27.534388<br>
(2023)<br>

- **Modeling the spatiotemporal spread of beneficial alleles using ancient genomes** [[link]](https://elifesciences.org/articles/73767)<br>
RA Muktupavela, <u>M Petr</u>, L Ségurel, _et al._<br>
**_Elife_** 11, e73767<br>
(2022)<br>

- **Unearthing Neanderthal population history using nuclear and mitochondrial DNA from cave sediments** [[link]](https://www.science.org/doi/full/10.1126/science.abf1667)<br>
B Vernot, EI Zavala, A Gómez-Olivencia, Z Jacobs, V Slon, F Mafessoni, F Romagné, A Pearson, <u>M Petr</u>, _et al._<br>
**_Science_** 372 (6542), eabf1667<br>
(2021)<br>

- **Reconstructing the genetic history of late Neanderthals** [[link]](https://www.nature.com/articles/nature26151)<br>
M Hajdinjak, Q Fu, A Hübner, <u>M Petr</u>, _et al._<br>
**_Nature_** 555 (7698), 652-656<br>
(2018)<br>

- **The genetic history of ice age Europe** [[link]](https://www.nature.com/articles/nature17993)<br>
Q Fu, C Posth, M Hajdinjak, <u>M Petr</u>, _et al._<br>
**_Nature_** 534 (7606), 200-205<br>
(2016)<br>

## Outreach articles

- **The Next Piece of Our Big Genetic Puzzle** [[link]](https://www.anthropology-news.org/articles/the-next-piece-of-our-big-genetic-puzzle/)<br>
_<u>M Petr</u><br>
Anthropology News_ issue on Genetics<br>
(2021)<br>
